title: Getting rid of Adam and Lilith
display_title: Getting rid of Adam and Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Getting rid of Adam and Lilith?             Quote Post by mastervampire » Wed Jan 25, 2012 2:21 am Firstly I know that Seele needed Adam and Lillith for their own plans. I was just wondering today what if they didn't need them and didn't want to go ahead with their own plan for instrumentality. If they just sent them both out into space to get them away from the Earth what would happen to the Angels? And also even if one did find and fuse with them what would happen if it was really far away from Earth? Would human life be effected?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 25, 2012 2:32 am mastervampire wrote: Firstly I know that Seele needed Adam and Lillith for their own plans.
